headline: Ralph's autonomous burndown loop shipped a fast run of fleet-hardening work on top of the design-system drop (#42): the launch gate is now armed (SITE_LIVE backported to all 4 previously-unprotected apps #50, the acceptance realData check runs automatically on production builds #78, root `pnpm test` wired into CI #51), a bugfix batch landed (duplicate sectionOrder ids + weak phone validation #89, unreadable junk-removal hero contrast #79, the 3 preview apps' latent gallery/sectionOrder bug #52, scaffold perf defaults #81), new user-facing surface shipped (branded /thanks page + default form redirect #80, machine-parseable JSON-LD hours + robots.txt + OG completeness #83, a11y baseline — focus ring, skip link, reduced-motion hero video #82, Lighthouse ≥95 + axe=100 CI budgets #88), the visual-regression fleet-drift tripwire re-landed on current main (#74, supersedes stale PR #3), vitest coverage was added for the schema contract (#53) and new-client/eject-client tooling (#54), and leadToConfig() — the deterministic lead→ClientConfig mapper behind the ops create-site button — merged (#122, first slice of #121). 2026-07-12: the loop halted idle (a spurious failed attempt on #86 — the model's deliberate blocked-stop counted as a failure — plus label events swallowed by the concurrency dedup, with no cron watchdog to recover). Diagnosed and corrected fleet-wide (shipped, not staged): hirobius/ralph#13 (hourly schedule-event chain hop) + #14 (reconcile now routes a deliberate blocked-stop — model posts a `ralph-blocked:` sentinel, or the issue leaves the ready queue mid-run — to needs-adrian GREEN with no attempt burned; prompt.md §1 mandates the sentinel; added the engine's first self-CI + reconcile regression tests). Rolled out to all three consumers: hourly watchdog callers (#124/#167/#177) + vendored-kit re-sync (#125/#168/#178). Both P0s cleared in the process (ops#99, hds#126). All 7 apps build clean. Engine still frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: Ralph idle-watchdog + reconcile fix DONE fleet-wide; make `Engine tests` (hirobius/ralph) and each repo's ralph-gate the required branch-protection checks; triage ops's pre-existing red pnpm-audit gate (55 vulns, non-required); fix the ralph README's `git tag -f v1` line — v1 is a branch
Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
blocked: Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
#84/#85/#87/#35/#41/#27 need a human decision before Ralph can pick them up
